sections.paragraph: μωρός, ά, όν [Skt. assoc.] ‘having little sense’, foolish, stupid Mt 7:26; 23:17; 25:2; 1 Cor 1:25; 4:10; 2 Ti 2:23; Tit 3:9. The coloration of the exclamatory μωρέ Mt 5:22 cannot be precisely determined apart from its contemptuous aspect embedded in the context; some strong rendering like imbecile, rather than the bland term ‘fool’, is required.
